phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Slight deficit at level 1: Anivia's wall-frost poke control edge out your cage-stack inevitability on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: At level 2 the numbers lean his way — the wall-frost poke control out-tick your cage-stack inevitability in even exchanges. Don't bleed for pride; take the trades his cooldowns hand you.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Cage online: drop it ON yourself when he engages, behind him when he farms — the geometry does the fighting.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Lost Chapter timing — Q-stack on cooldown and double-stack off cannon waves. The curve is the matchup.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Slight deficit at the level-6 breakpoint: Anivia's wall-frost poke control edge out your cage-stack inevitability on the margins. You can still trade — just let him start the exchanges and answer on your terms.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Luden's spike: cage-W-Q-R deletes squishies who touch the wall. Your zone is a courtroom now.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Slight edge at two-plus items: your cage-stack inevitability beat Anivia's wall-frost poke control on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q through two units on every last-hit — each stack is permanent AP; the lane is a savings account from level 1.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: W on cage-stunned or rooted targets only — uncaged Dark Matter is a donation to his dodge stats.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Primordial Burst online — anyone under half is now a math problem with one answer. Count R damage out loud.

phases.why: Your cage-stack inevitability out-muscle Galio's anti-magic shield trades at two-plus items — this window is yours, so force the trades and tax every step toward the wave.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q through two units on every last-hit — each stack is permanent AP; the lane is a savings account from level 1.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: W on cage-stunned or rooted targets only — uncaged Dark Matter is a donation to his dodge stats.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Cage online: drop it ON yourself when he engages, behind him when he farms — the geometry does the fighting.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Lost Chapter timing — Q-stack on cooldown and double-stack off cannon waves. The curve is the matchup.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Primordial Burst online — anyone under half is now a math problem with one answer. Count R damage out loud.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Luden's spike: cage-W-Q-R deletes squishies who touch the wall. Your zone is a courtroom now.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Veigar IS the scaling argument: cage the choke, burst the carry, and let infinite AP write the closing statement.
